attacking_style: Uphill finishes at 200-500m to go where he can use power to drop pure sprinters; also attacks at distance (20-50km) in breakaways on lumpy stages to filter field before final climbs.
team_tactics: Team sets sustained climbing tempo to drop traditional sprint trains and pure fastmen, creating reduced bunch sprint scenarios that favor his durability over raw speed. Occasionally provides dual-role leadout work.
terrain_preference: Lumpy parcours with late climbs that eliminate pure sprinters but allow puncheur-sprinters to survive; uphill drag sprints of 200-500m. Struggles on flat power sprints and when illness/poor form compromises climbing durability.
vulnerability: Launches uphill sprint too early (150-200m) and gets overhauled by better-timed accelerations. Team lacks depth to control quality breakaways. Traditional flat sprints expose lack of pure speed finishing punch.
key_patterns: Uphill sprint finishes suit him: won/contested 500m uphill attacks in 2017, 2022 Catalunya (repeated venue win)
Timing premature in uphill sprints: launched first at 150m but caught by Van Aert (2022 TDF)
Peak form allows energy expenditure others can't match: won after doing leadout/climb work (2017 TDF, 2022 Catalunya)
Survives climbs pure sprinters cannot: team tempo filtering creates favorable reduced-bunch scenarios (2023 Giro, 2017 TDF)
Breakaway capable on lumpy stages: won from 23-rider break after 50km attack (2022 TDF Stage 16)
Course-specific advantage: repeated 2019 Catalunya stage 1 win on identical 2022 finish
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Giro win showed renewed climbing durability after mixed 2022 results, defying age decline at 38 with ability to survive team-filtered parcours
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
